overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Batman game showing the character standing on a rainy rooftop overlooking a neon-lit Gotham City at night. The scene features modern glass skyscrapers with illuminated windows, construction cranes, and atmospheric rain effects against a dark, blue-toned urban skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy rooftop perch overlooking downtown skyline

agents.ego_description: Batman stands motionless on a rooftop ledge with his cape flowing in the wind, surveying the neon-lit city below

entered.detail: tall skyscraper with reflective glass facade and illuminated windows featuring neon accents
large industrial construction crane silhouetted against the cloudy night sky
metal safety railing along the edge of the rooftop with wooden platform flooring
large square billboard structure glowing white in the distance between buildings
colorful neon signage and window illumination on the building facades

segments.scene_description: Batman stands on a rainy rooftop overlooking a sprawling urban cityscape at night. The scene is dominated by a modern glass skyscraper to the right with vibrant neon lights, while construction cranes and a distant illuminated billboard punctuate the skyline. Rain falls steadily as the camera maintains a steady third-person view from behind the character, capturing the atmospheric glow of the city lights reflecting off wet surfaces.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady third-person perspective of Batman on a rainy rooftop, capturing the atmospheric depth of a neon-lit urban skyline. It begins with the character overlooking a sprawling cityscape at night, where the steady fall of rain creates a shimmering effect across the environment. As the camera lingers, the focus emphasizes the contrast between the dark rooftop and the vibrant glow of a modern glass skyscraper to the right. The scene then expands to reveal construction cranes and a distant illuminated billboard that punctuate the horizon, while the city lights reflect vividly off the wet surfaces.
